text:
On a small, picturesque island in the middle of the Caribbean Sea, there was a quirky little café called "Cape Cod café." The café had golden roofs, bright pink walls plastered with old seashells, and an outdoor seating area that became busy with locals and tourists alike during lunchtime.

One warm summer day, the café owner, Betty, decided to organize a scavenger hunt for her best friend, Chuck, who loved mysteries. Betty had devised an exciting challenge for him to embark on, hiding riddles, hidden treasures, and tokens throughout the village. Her friend Chuck was ecstatic; it was his kind of adventure.

Chuck grabbed his clue booklet, filled with Betty's humorous riddles. He had only to follow the clues and don't ask silly questions, she'd tell us. As the sun dipped lower in the sky, painting the world with hues of orange and pink, he started his journey.
